title: Returns to Buying Winners and Selling Losers: A Cross-Sectional Momentum Reproduction Study
abstract: We study cross-sectional momentum in monthly US equity returns from 1965 to 1989. Ranking NYSE and AMEX common stocks on their past 6-month returns and holding the equal-weighted winner-minus-loser decile portfolio for 6 overlapping months earns approximately 0.95% per month before transaction costs (Table 1). Monthly momentum portfolio returns are publicly available from the Kenneth French data library, and replication code is available on GitHub.
